title: Seller advice without the hype.
lead: HRSellers exists because most marketplace-seller advice online is written to sell you something. We set out to do the opposite — grounded, honest, and genuinely useful.
bodyP1: Search for how to sell on Amazon, eBay, or Shopify and you'll drown in content written by people who've never reconciled a payout report or filed a reimbursement claim. Affiliate sites push whatever pays the most. Generic blogs recycle the same surface-level tips.
bodyP2: We wanted a resource built the way we'd want to read one: start from real operational problems, verify the facts, recommend tools on merit, and be upfront about how the lights stay on. That's the whole idea.
